heading: I manage the content, so you can manage the business.
paragraphs: ✦ I've run content brands from zero, managing every digital asset, deadline, and edit myself.
✦ I've delivered commissioned edits for U.S.-based artists reaching millions of views natively, proving I can read a global algorithm.
✦ I work in Premiere Pro and After Effects daily, and run successful paid social campaigns that actually convert.
✦ I don't just edit videos. I build the operations behind them so they actually get seen.
✦ Open to remote work for video editing, paid social, and content operations across US, UK, AU, and Asia time zones.
